productDisplayName: Probase Men Printed Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the in-seam, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron: do not iron on decorations Update your casual style with this navy blue T-shirt from probase. The graphic print of Einstein gives this tee a stylish and intellectual edge while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look.
